markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff the Spendesk \<\> GrowthX partnership and align on the 8-week plan.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Reverse Spendesk's organic traffic decline and hit a target of **800 organic leads/month** (up from \~600) within 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=3302.0)
  - [**Method:** GrowthX will build a fine-tuned AI content engine, distinct from simple LLM tools, that is calibrated by experienced human editors.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**Phased Approach:** Phase 1 (next 8 weeks) focuses on English content. Phase 2 will expand to localization, starting with 1–2 French test articles.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [**Spendesk's Value:** A complete spend management solution that empowers finance teams to control spend with confidence, saving time and enabling strategic work.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Reversing Organic Traffic Decline

  - [Spendesk's organic traffic and leads have been declining, creating an urgent need for a new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=3336.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Reverse the traffic decline and increase organic leads from \~600/month to **800/month** within 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=3302.0)
      - [**Definition:** "Organic leads" includes direct and brand traffic, not just traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=3447.0)
  - [**Secondary Goal:** Prepare for the future of search by optimizing for LLM referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

### The Solution: GrowthX's AI Content Engine

  - [GrowthX's engine is a fine-tuned AI workflow, not a simple LLM API, designed for quality and strategic impact.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [**Key Components:**](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
    1.  [**Dynamic Artifacts:** The AI workflow is fed dynamic artifacts (ICP profiles, writing guidelines, product info) to ensure content is contextually relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
    2.  [**Human Editors:** Experienced editors review every piece of content to ensure quality and narrative flow.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
    3.  [**Engine Calibration:** Editor feedback is used to fine-tune the AI pipeline, ensuring systemic improvements (e.g., tone of voice) rather than one-off edits.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**SEO & LLM Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [Optimizing for LLMs (e.g., chunked content, FAQ style) also benefits SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [The strategy will focus on high-quality content to build E-A-T (Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) and protect existing SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)

### Spendesk's Value & Target Personas

  - [**Core Value Proposition:**](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
      - [**Complete Solution:** One platform for all spend management, replacing manual work and point solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
      - [**User-Friendly:** High NPS from non-finance users due to an intuitive UI.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
      - [**Empowering Finance:** Enables control without being a bottleneck, freeing up time for strategic work (forecasting, planning).](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=3136.0)
  - [**Target Personas:**](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2664.0)
      - [**Primary:** Finance Managers, Controllers, and Heads of Finance (champions/economic buyers).](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
      - [**Secondary:** Accountants and Bookkeepers (daily users who need to see positive sentiment).](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)
  - [**Key Pain Points Solved:**](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2859.0)
      - [Loss of spend control in fast-growing companies.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2859.0)
      - [Long, chaotic month-end closes due to scattered data.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2931.0)
      - [The trade-off between speed and accuracy in financial reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=3094.0)

### Project Plan & Localization

  - [**8-Week Phase 1 Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [**W1:** Kickoff & Discovery (today).](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [**W2:** Content Strategy presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**W3:** Content Calendar & Calibration Article.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**W4+:** Production ramp-up (3 articles/week → 5 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [**Localization (Phase 2):**](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [**Focus:** Phase 1 is English-only to perfect the core engine.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
      - [**Goal:** Produce 1–2 French test articles in Phase 1 to validate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [**Method:** True localization (culturally relevant content) will be used, not direct translation.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The main bottleneck for localization is finding and training a native-speaking editor for each market.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

### Content Approval Process

  - [**Stakeholder-Based Approval:**](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [**Content Team:** Handles general topics (e.g., "12 Spend Management Tools").](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [**Product Marketing:** Reviews product-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [**Finance Team:** Reviews deep thought leadership pieces (e.g., "CFO's Toughest Role").](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2451.0)
  - [**SLA:** 24–48 hour turnaround after a 2-week stakeholder notice.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [**Goal:** Establish a recurring, predictable review cadence (e.g., a 30-min weekly slot) to streamline approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2419.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Send discovery artifacts (ICP profiles, guidelines) by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Present the content strategy in Week 2.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**Cristina (Spendesk):**](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Share the Notion page with customer quotes and stats.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2241.0)
      - [Work with internal stakeholders to establish a predictable content review cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/HpsFT3Ka5uBm5HjSxWk5Fjup8Xd7FnkG?tab=summary&timestamp=2419.0)
